title: Add Biometric Login
description: Implement biometric authentication as an alternative to password entry.
instructions:
Add biometric login to your auth system:

1. Update the login screen to show a biometric button when:
   - Biometrics are available on the device
   - User has previously logged in successfully
   - User has enabled biometric login in settings

2. Implement secure credential storage:
   - Store refresh token securely using flutter_secure_storage
   - Add a biometric prompt before retrieving credentials
   - Handle biometric authentication failures gracefully

3. Add biometric settings to the profile screen:
   - Toggle to enable/disable biometric login
   - Requires password confirmation to enable
   - Shows which biometric method is available (face, fingerprint)

hints.text: Use local_auth package to check available biometrics and authenticate.
Create a BiometricAuthService that coordinates between local_auth and secure storage.
Always require password entry at least once before enabling biometric for security.
